summary: Iteration 185: Bug Fix Verification - All three reported bugs have been fixed and verified. 1) auSpelling.js iOS Safari crash fixed with dictionary-based approach and try-catch safety net, 2) 'created_at' KeyError fixed by adding field to pipeline models, 3) Timeline chronological ordering improved with secondary sort. All 12 backend tests pass, all frontend tabs load without crash.
critical_code_review_comments: auSpelling.js COMPLETELY REWRITTEN: Uses dictionary map (SPELLING_MAP) + single regex pass instead of 100+ chained .replace() calls. This avoids iOS Safari JIT crash 'Attempted to assign to readonly property'
auSpelling.js has proper input guards: Line 91 handles null, undefined, empty string, non-string inputs by returning text || ''
auSpelling.js has try-catch safety net (lines 93-182): Any error returns original text unchanged
pipeline_models.py: DocumentExtract, IssueClassification, IssueVerification all have 'created_at' field with default factory
grounds.py and pipeline_staged.py: _safe_isoformat helper function safely converts datetime to isoformat, handles missing keys
timeline.py: Events sorted by (event_date, created_at) for proper chronological ordering
seed_data_creation: None - used existing case_f65b65848793 (NSW Folbigg case)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 185 verified three bug fixes: (1) auSpelling.js iOS Safari crash - completely rewritten with dictionary-based single-pass approach, (2) 'created_at' KeyError - added field to DocumentExtract, IssueClassification, IssueVerification models with _safe_isoformat helper, (3) Timeline ordering - secondary sort by created_at. Test case: case_f65b65848793 (NSW Folbigg) with 1 document, 3 timeline events, 7 grounds, 3 reports. All tabs load without crash. Backend endpoints verified: /api/cases/{case_id}/grounds, /api/cases/{case_id}/grounds/auto-identify, /api/cases/{case_id}/grounds/{ground_id}/investigate, /api/cases/{case_id}/timeline.
